name: com.nekuzaky.kinema
description: Data-driven motion matching locomotion for Unity. Offline bake pipeline from AnimationClips, a normalized feature database with gait phase, a Burst-compiled weighted search, a PlayableGraph runtime, and an integrated editor window with live debug, in-window recording/ghost replay, one-click rig swap, and a search-performance benchmark.

samples.description: A ready-to-run locomotion scene (rig, controller, collision motor, gamepad+keyboard input, orbit camera, vault/free-jump events) built in one click - bakes an installed mocap pack, or a dropped-in FBX, or generates demo animations when you supply nothing.
